prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel so a comparative read of operational state can be made.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should list the in-service transformer IDs, then for each of T-005 and T-013 surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel, and call out any qualitative difference between the two units.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_assets — Enumerate the transformers currently in service
  Step 2: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for a representative healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for a representative degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [1])
  Step 4: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [2])
  Step 5: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [3])
  Step 6: [iot] list_assets — Select an alternative healthy unit from the list of transformers currently in service
  Step 7: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for the selected alternative healthy unit (depends on steps [6])
  Step 8: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the healthy unit (depends on steps [7])
  Step 9: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for a representative degraded unit (T-013)
  Step 10: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [9])
  Step 11: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for the selected alternative healthy unit, using the transformer_id from the list of in-service transformers
  Step 12: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the healthy unit (depends on steps [11])
  Step 13: [iot] list_sensors — Get the available sensor channels for a representative degraded unit (T-013)
  Step 14: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get recent telemetry samples for each sensor channel of the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [13])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)

## Agent Final Answer
The fleet status snapshot shows several transformers currently in service, including T-011, T-012, T-013, and T-014. 

For a representative healthy unit, T-005 was initially considered but due to an error, an alternative healthy unit's sensor channels were surfaced instead. The available sensor channels for this unit include load_current_a, oil_temp_c, power_factor, voltage_hv_kv, voltage_lv_kv, and winding_temp_top_c. Recent telemetry samples for these channels show various readings, such as load current ranging from 205.914 A to 287.912 A.

For a degraded unit, T-013, the available sensor channels are the same as the healthy unit: load_current_a, oil_temp_c, power_factor, voltage_hv_kv, voltage_lv_kv, and winding_temp_top_c. Recent telemetry samples for T-013's channels show load current readings ranging from 167.402 A to 278.763 A.

Comparing the operational state of the healthy and degraded units, both have similar sensor channels, but the telemetry samples show different readings, indicating potential differences in their operational conditions.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": true, "data_retrieval_accuracy": false, "generalized_result_verification": true, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": true, "suggestions": "Improve data retrieval accuracy and agent sequence correctness"}
